[33mUsage:[0m [32mdemo[0m [[36m<file>[0m] [flags]

[33mArguments:[0m
  [[36m<file>[0m]    Input file.

[33mFlags:[0m
  [32m-h[0m, [32m--help[0m       Show context-sensitive help.
  [32m-v[0m, [32m--verbose[0m    Enable verbose output.
  [32m-t[0m, [32m--sep[0m=[36mSEP[0m    CSV separator.
